author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو بكر أحمد بن محمد بن هارون بن يزيد الخَلَّال البغدادي الحنبلي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent Hanbali scholar and jurist, known for his extensive compilation of the works of Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal and his students.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of the larger collection of works by al-Khallal, focusing on the transmission of hadith and the teachings of Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Contributes to the understanding of early Hanbali jurisprudence and the transmission of hadith within the school.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: The editor, al-Haddad, is known for his careful and scholarly approach to textual investigation.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The edition appears to be based on a careful review of available manuscripts and includes a detailed isnad (chain of transmission).
